about.description: Lenģosa la P2P le arolelanoang le nang le encryption ea E2E

miniapp.failedToLoad: E hlolehile ho kenya Mini App

privacy.title: Lekunutu
privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Ha senotlolo se secha sa kamore se amoheloa - fetisetsa ka bo eona lisebelisoa tsohle tsa hau (E2E encrypted)
privacy.historySyncHint: Khopi e patiloeng ea melaetsa e fumaneha lisebelisoa tsohle. Seva e bona lerata feela
privacy.crossSignHint: Netefatsa lisebelisoa tse ncha ka boiketsetso ka ho saena ha HMAC (ts'ireletso khahlanong le ho kenya sebaka)
privacy.backupHint: Ngola linotlolo tsohle ka poleloana 'me u li boloke ho seva. Phetoho ea sesebelisoa - khutlisetsa ka poleloana e le 'ngoe.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Fetisetsa linotlolo sesebelisoa se secha ka khoutu ea linomoro tse 6. Linotlolo li patiloe ka ECIES - seva ha e khone ho li bala.
privacy.ssssHint: Arola senotlolo sa master likarolong tsa N ho sebelisa morero oa Shamir. Likarolo leha e le life tsa M li tla tsosolosa senotlolo. Karolo e 'ngoe le e' ngoe e patiloe bakeng sa lebitso le itseng le tšepahalang (ECIES). Seva e bona feela li-blobs tse patiloeng.
privacy.federatedHint: Abela li-shards tse kentsoeng ka mokhoa o patiloeng ho pholletsa le li-federation node (Sekema sa Shamir). Leha seva e lahlehile - ho hlaphoheloa ka lithaka.
privacy.ktHint: Lenane la tlatsetso feela la liphetoho tsohle tsa linotlolo tsa sechaba ka ketane ea hash (Merkle). Seva se saena se kentsoeng - tlolo e bonoa nakong ea tlhahlobo.

panic.desc: Lintlha tsohle tse ho node ena li tla hlakoloa ka ho sa feleng. Ketso ena e ke ke ea etsolloa.
panic.filesDestroyed: Lifaele tsohle le mecha ea litaba e senyehile
panic.keysOverwritten: Likonopo tsa ho qoelisoa li ngotsoe holimo
panic.callSettingsNote: Tlhokomeliso: Ho qobella mekhoa ea TCP le Relay ho ka eketsa latency empa ho fana ka lekunutu le phahameng. Ho pata sephethephethe ho eketsa padding e sa reroang ho linako tsa SDP ho sitisa tlhahlobo ea metadata ea khokahano.
panic.warningBody:
U mothating oa ho senya lintlha tsohle ka ho feletseng.
Ketso ena e ke ke ea etsolloa.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Mesaletsa eohle e tlositsoe. Seboka sena se felile.

fingerprint.emojiHint: Mahlakore ka bobeli a tlameha ho bona emoji e tšoanang. Bapisa ka seqo kapa ka mocha o sireletsehileng.
fingerprint.showQR: Hlahisa khoutu ea QR hore motho e mong a e hlahlobe

keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Kenya poleloana eo u e sebelisitseng ha u etsa bekapo.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: Hlakola bekapo ea linotlolo? Ketso ena e ke ke ea etsolloa.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Hlakola likarolo tsohle tsa bohlokoa? Ho fola ka batho bao u ba tšepang ho ke ke ha khoneha.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Senotlolo sa hau sa master se tla aroloa ka likarolo tsa N ho sebelisa morero oa Shamir. Likarolo leha e le life tsa M li tla lumella ho hlaphoheloa ha bohlokoa. Kabelo e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe e ngoletsoe motho eo u mo tšepang.

botConstructor.title: Moetsi oa Bot
botConstructor.subtitle: Theha bot ea hau ka pono - ha ho na khoutu e hlokahalang
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Molaetsa oa kamohelo ha mosebelisi a qala bot...
botConstructor.scheduledMessage: Molaetsa o lokelang ho romelloa ka linako...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Rea u amohela! Ke bot ea hau. Sebelisa /thusa ho bona litaelo.
botConstructor.defaultHelp:
Litaelo tse teng:
/thuso — Bontša molaetsa ona
botConstructor.randomPick: Bot e khetha e le 'ngoe ka tšohanyetso
botConstructor.apiResponseTemplate: Setšoantšo sa karabo se nang le {data}...
botConstructor.notifyOnEvent: E qala ha mosebelisi a romella molaetsa
botConstructor.adminMessage: Molaetsa o lokelang ho romelloa ho admin...
botConstructor.docsCommand: E araba ha mosebelisi a romella taelo e itseng (mohlala, /help, /start). U ka eketsa mehato ea moqoqo ho theha lipuisano tsa mehato e mengata.
botConstructor.docsMessage: E araba ha molaetsa wa mosebedisi o bapa le paterone. E sebelisa regex - mohlala. "hello|hi" e tsamaisana le mantsoe ana ka bobeli. Ha e na taba.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Basebelisi ba molaetsa oa pele ba bona ha ba qala bot ka /start. Bot e 'ngoe le e' ngoe e lokela ho ba le eona.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: E romela molaetsa ka ho iketsa ka kemiso. E ntle bakeng sa likhopotso tsa letsatsi le letsatsi, tlhamane ea beke le beke, kapa liphatlalatso tsa nako le nako.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Makala a bot logic. Lekola tlhahiso e fapaneng kapa ea mosebelisi 'me u arabe ka tsela e fapaneng ho latela sephetho.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot e khetha karabo e le 'ngoe lethathamong. E nepahetse bakeng sa metlae, malebela, litumeliso, kapa likarabo tse fapaneng.
botConstructor.docsApi: E etsa kopo ea HTTP ho API ea kantle mme e sebelisa karabo ho molaetsa oa bot. Sebelisa {data.field} ho sheba likarolo tsa likarabo.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: E romela tsebiso ho batsamaisi ba phaposi ha e lekoa. E thusa bakeng sa litlhokomeliso, litsebiso tse ncha tsa basebelisi, kapa ho laola.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Kenya mehato ho thibela ea Taelo ho theha lipuisano tse sebetsanang. Mohato o mong le o mong o botsa potso, o emela karabo ea mosebelisi, ebe o e boloka ho mofuta o fapaneng. Sebelisa mefuta-futa karabong ea ho qetela ka {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Sebelisa li-curly braces {variable} ho sengoloa sa karabo ho kenya lintlha tse feto-fetohang. Liphetoho tsa naha li ntse li tsoela pele ho pholletsa le melaetsa.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Liphetoho tse hahelletsoeng li fumaneha karabong e ngoe le e ngoe:
botConstructor.docsVarIsAdmin: Ke 'nete haeba mosebelisi e le admin/mong'a
botConstructor.docsVarRoomId: ID ea kamore ea hona joale
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: U ka sebelisa sebopeho se kang HTML likarabong:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Qala ka Sebaka sa Kamohelo - ke ntho ea pele eo basebelisi ba e bonang
botConstructor.docsTip2: Kenya taelo ea /help e thathamisang litaelo tsohle tse fumanehang
botConstructor.docsTip3: Sebelisa mehato ea moqoqo ho ngolisa, ho etsa lipatlisiso, kapa ho bokella lintlha
botConstructor.docsTip4: Kopanya li-block tsa Condition tse nang le mefuta e fapaneng bakeng sa branching e bohlale
botConstructor.docsTip5: Lekola bot ea hau ka ho bua le eona ka phapusing ka mor'a ho e sebelisa

gravitixDocs.title: Reference Puo ea Gravitix
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Puo ea ho ngola e sebetsang hantle bakeng sa ho aha bots. 96 likarolo. Rust backend.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix ke puo e khethehileng ea domain (DSL) e entsoeng ho tloha fatše ho ngola li-Vortex bots. Moo lipuo tse ling li hlokang lilaeborari, li-callbacks, le li-boilerplate, Gravitix e u fa batho ba sebetsanang le liketsahalo tsa maemo a holimo, meqoqo e phallang, le boemo bo hahelletsoeng - tsohle ka mokhoa o hloekileng, o balehang o bululetsoeng ke Rust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: E ka baloa - khoutu e baleha joalo ka sepheo, eseng mochini
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Sireletsehile - mefuta e tsitsitseng e tšoara liphoso pele ho nako ea ho sebetsa
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Expressive - phallo, balebeli, le ho bapisa mohlala li hahiloe kahare
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Minimal - ha ho litlelase, ha ho lefa, ha ho meralo ea ho ithuta
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: Gravitix ke ea mang kapa mang ea batlang ho haha ​​​​bot ea Vortex kapele - hore na ha o e-so ngole khoutu pele, kapa u moqapi ea nang le phihlelo ea khathetseng ke Python boilerplate. Buka ena e ruta Gravitix ho tloha ho melao-motheo ea pele: ha ho na phihlelo ea pele e hlokahalang.
gravitixDocs.howToRead: Mokhoa oa ho bala bukana ena
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Karolo ka 'ngoe e itšetlehile ka tse fetileng. Haeba u sa tsoa qala ho etsa mananeo, bala ho tloha holimo ho ea tlase. Haeba u se u ntse u tseba puo e 'ngoe, sebelisa lethathamo la litaba ho tlolela ka ho toba seo u se ratang.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Tsela e potlakileng ho tloha ho zero ho ea ho bot e sebetsang.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: on /start {... } - e hlalosa sebatli se sebetsang ha mosebelisi a romela /start. emit "..." - e romela molaetsa ho mosebelisi. {ctx.first_name} — e kopanya lebitso la mosebelisi khoeleng.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Ho Gravitix IDE, tobetsa konopo ea Run bareng e kaholimo. Kenya Vortex Bot Token ea hau ha u khothalletsoa. Bot e qala hang-hang - ha ho mohato oa ho haha ​​o hlokahalang.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Lenaneo le leng le le leng la Gravitix le hahiloe ho tloha ho li-blocks tse tharo tsa motheo tsa moaho: li-handers, emit statements, le logic.
gravitixDocs.multipleEmits: Melaetsa e mengata = melaetsa e mengata
gravitixDocs.multipleHandlers: Lisebelisoa tse ngata bakeng sa "trigger" e le 'ngoe
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Boleng bo bong le bo bong ho Gravitix bo na le mofuta. Sistimi ea mofuta o tsitsitse: mefuta e hlahlojoa ka nako ea pokello, pele bot ea hau e sebetsa.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Basebelisi ba kopanya litekanyetso ho hlahisa litekanyetso tse ncha.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Lithapo ho Gravitix ke mongolo o kentsoeng oa UTF-8. Ba ts'ehetsa ho kenyeletsoa ho hoholo le sehlopha sa ts'ebetso e hahelletsoeng.
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Paterone-bapisa boleng khahlano le lipaterone tse ngata. Nahana ka eona e le polelo e matla ea switjha.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Mesebetsi ke li-blocks tsa khoutu tse ka sebelisoang hape. Li u thusa ho qoba ho pheta-pheta le ho etsa hore khoutu e utloisisehe habonolo.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Handlers ke pelo ea Gravitix bot. Motshwari e mong le e mong o mamela mofuta o itseng wa ketsahalo mme o matha ha ketsahalo eo e etsahala.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Balebeli ba u lumella ho eketsa boemo ho motho ea sebetsang. Motho ea sebetsang o sebetsa feela haeba molebeli a lekola 'nete.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Ntho ea ctx e fumaneha ka bo eona kahare ho mohlokomeli e mong le e mong. E na le tlhahisoleseling mabapi le molaetsa oa hajoale le mosebelisi ea o rometseng.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: Naha e lumella bot ea hau ho hopola lintho lipakeng tsa melaetsa. Ntle le mmuso, molaetsa o mong le o mong o ikemetse mme bot ha e na mohopolo.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Phallo e etsa hore u ngole lipuisano tsa mehato e mengata ka mokhoa o hlakileng, o ka baloang. Phallo e ka ema 'me ea emela molaetsa o latelang oa mosebelisi.
gravitixDocs.waitKeyword: Lebitso la sehlooho la ho ema
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: Ho romella melaetsa ke tlhahiso ea mantlha ea bot.
gravitixDocs.emitTo: emit_to - romella ho mosebelisi ea itseng
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Matha khoutu ka bo eona ka kemiso - ha ho mesebetsi ea cron, ha ho na lits'ebeletso tsa kantle tse hlokahalang.
gravitixDocs.everyRepeat: mong le e mong - pheta ka nako
gravitixDocs.atSpecificTime: ka - matha ka nako e itseng ea letsatsi
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Opereishene ea pipe |> e fetisa boleng e le khang ea pele mosebetsing o latelang. E etsa hore mesebetsi ea ketane e balehe, ho tloha ho le letšehali ho ea ho le letona.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Gravitix e fana ka ho sebetsana le liphoso tse hlophisitsoeng ka li-block / try / catch / qetellong.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Litaelo li u lumella ho bokella data e amanang le eona tlasa mofuta o itseng. Enum e hlalosa sehlopha se koetsoeng sa mefuta e fapaneng.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: Gravitix e tsamaisa laeborari ea lipalo e felletseng e nang le ~ mesebetsi e 180.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: Gravitix e na le mofuta oa tlhaho o rarahaneng - para ea 64-bit floats e emelang likarolo tsa 'nete le tse inahaneloang.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: Gravitix e kenyelletsa lipalo tsa lipalo: li-derivatives le li-integral tse bakiloeng ka mesebetsi e sa reroang.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Linear algebra ke lipalo tsa li-vectors le matrices.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Khopolo ea linomoro e ithuta ka litšobotsi tsa linomoro. Motheo oa mehleng ea kajeno ea li-cryptography.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Lipalopalo li fana ka lisebelisoa tsa ho hlalosa, ho sekaseka, le ho fihlela liqeto ho tsoa ho data.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Mesebetsi e khethehileng ke tharollo ea li-equation tsa bohlokoa tse fapaneng.
gravitixDocs.gammaRelated: Gamma le mesebetsi e amanang le eona
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Fourier phetoho e senya lets'oao ho maqhubu a lona.
gravitixDocs.listMethods: Mekhoa ea ho etsa lethathamo (note ea matheba)
gravitixDocs.bestPractices: Mekhoa e Molemo ka ho Fetisisa
gravitixDocs.bp1: Kamehla sebetsana le tse sa tsejoeng
gravitixDocs.bp3: Sebelisa balebeli sebakeng sa haeba-ketane bakeng sa tumello
gravitixDocs.bp5: Sebelisa ho khutlela pele ho nako ho fokotsa sehlaha
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Mokhoa o motle oa ho ithuta Gravitix ke ho haha. Qala ka echo bot e bonolo, ebe u eketsa boemo, ebe u eketsa phallo. Khopolo e 'ngoe le e 'ngoe e ncha eo u ithutang eona e bula menyetla e mengata.
